meta.title: Tips For When Your Husband Leaves For Deployment
meta.description:
It’s not just the service member who has to prepare for deployment. In fact, a spouse staying at home often needs to do just as much, or more preparation.

Brittani Krebbs from @Brit+Con is here to share her pre-deployment and deployment tips for getting through your first deployment.

Want more tips on how to prepare for deployment?
https://sbxx.us/39n4FqI
